description_long: This factory building features a rectangular, utilitarian structure with a flat roof and a predominantly gray exterior, accented by blue elements on one side. The building includes a prominent section that juts out, possibly housing loading docks or machinery, and two large, prong-like extensions that resemble industrial loading equipment or dock doors. The roof is flat and appears to have a small raised section, potentially for rooftop access or minor equipment. The windows are minimal and not easily visible, suggesting a focus on function over aesthetics. The overall design is simple and robust, typical of modern industrial facilities.
description: A gray, rectangular factory building with blue accents, flat roof, and prominent industrial loading features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main rectangular facade with minimal visible features and a flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals blue-accented sections and two large prong-like extensions, likely loading docks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the building with the loading extensions more visible and some minor rooftop detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the industrial extensions and the building's robust, functional design.
